name: Carnatzlach
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients except the club soda and mix well with your hands so it becomes compact.
2. Add the soda gradually, kneading between additions until the dough is smooth, fine, and almost elastic.
3. Wet the palms of your hands and roll portions of the mixture into sausage-like cylinders, each about 3/4 to 1 inch thick and 3 to 4 inches long.
4. Arrange in a single layer on a platter and cover with wax paper or foil.
5. Chill for at least five hours, but preferably 24, to develop the flavor. Let stand at room temperature for one hour before cooking.
6. Broil for about 10 minutes, turning frequently so all sides brown. Turn with tongs or a wooden spatula so the sausages don't break.
7. Makes six servings.
